sets.name: TWIST Red Lace Interchangeable Set - Small 5"
sets.description: Surgical stainless steel tips with TWIST red cables. Small set covers US 2 through US 8 in 5-inch tip length.

sets.name: TWIST Red Lace Interchangeable Set - Large 5"
sets.description: Surgical stainless steel tips with TWIST red cables. Large set covers US 9 through US 15 in 5-inch tip length.

sets.name: TWIST Red Lace Interchangeable Set - Complete 5"
sets.description: Surgical stainless steel tips with TWIST red cables. Complete set covers US 2 through US 15 in 5-inch tip length.

sets.name: TWIST Red Lace Interchangeable Set - Small 4"
sets.description: Surgical stainless steel tips with TWIST red cables. Small set covers US 2 through US 8 in 4-inch tip length, ideal for smaller projects and magic loop.

sets.name: TWIST Red Lace Interchangeable Set - Large 4"
sets.description: Surgical stainless steel tips with TWIST red cables. Large set covers US 9 through US 15 in 4-inch tip length.

sets.name: TWIST Red Lace Interchangeable Set - Complete 4"
sets.description: Surgical stainless steel tips with TWIST red cables. Complete set covers US 2 through US 15 in 4-inch tip length.

sets.name: SPIN Bamboo Interchangeable Set - Small 5"
sets.description: Dark bamboo tips with TWIST red cables. Lightweight and warm, ideal for slippery yarns. Small set US 2 through US 8.

sets.name: SPIN Bamboo Interchangeable Set - Complete 5"
sets.description: Dark bamboo tips with TWIST red cables. Complete set covers US 2 through US 15 in 5-inch tip length.

sets.name: Zing Interchangeable Deluxe Set
sets.description: Color-coded anodized aluminum tips with smooth joins. Each size is a different color for easy identification. Deluxe set US 2.5 through US 11.

sets.name: Symfonie Interchangeable Deluxe Set
sets.description: Multi-colored laminated birch wood tips with smooth metal joins. Warm to the touch with slight grip. Deluxe set US 4 through US 11.

sets.name: Dreamz Interchangeable Deluxe Set
sets.description: Color-coded laminated birch wood tips. Each size is a different vibrant color. Lightweight and smooth. Deluxe set US 4 through US 11.

sets.name: Options Nickel-Plated Interchangeable Deluxe Set
sets.description: Nickel-plated brass tips with ultra-smooth finish. Fast knitting with slick yarn glide. Deluxe set US 4 through US 11.

sets.name: Driftwood Interchangeable Set - 3.5"
sets.description: Hand-finished birch wood tips with a driftwood-inspired finish. 3.5-inch tips are ideal for smaller projects and tight knitters. US 3 through US 17.

sets.name: Driftwood Interchangeable Set - 5"
sets.description: Hand-finished birch wood tips with a driftwood-inspired finish. 5-inch tips for standard knitting comfort. US 3 through US 17.

sets.name: Blush Interchangeable Set - 5"
sets.description: Hand-finished birch wood tips with a blush pink finish. Same precision as Driftwood with a distinctive pink color. US 3 through US 17.

sets.name: Click Basic Interchangeable Set
sets.description: Brass tips with a smooth olive-gold finish. Revolutionary click mechanism for quick tip changes without tools. US 4 through US 11.

sets.name: Click Turbo Interchangeable Set
sets.description: Turbo-finished brass tips with extra-smooth plating for fast knitting. Click mechanism. Slightly more slippery than Basic. US 4 through US 11.

sets.name: Click Lace Long Interchangeable Set
sets.description: Extra-sharp lace tips with elongated taper for fine lacework. Click mechanism. Brass with white-bronze finish. US 4 through US 11.

sets.name: Rocket Squared Interchangeable Set
sets.description: Square-profile brass tips with turbo-smooth finish. Ergonomic squared shape reduces hand fatigue. Click mechanism. US 4 through US 11.

sets.name: Sharp Steel Interchangeable Set - Small
sets.description: Hollow stainless steel tips with extra-sharp points, ideal for lace knitting. Lightweight despite being metal. Small set US 2 through US 8, 5-inch tips.

sets.name: Sharp Steel Interchangeable Set - Large
sets.description: Hollow stainless steel tips with extra-sharp points. Large set US 9 through US 15, 5-inch tips.

sets.name: Bamboo Interchangeable Set - Small
sets.description: Lightweight bamboo tips with smooth finish. Warm to the touch with gentle grip for slippery yarns. Small set US 2 through US 8, 5-inch tips.

sets.name: Takumi Interchangeable Circular Knitting Needle Set
sets.description: Smooth bamboo tips with precision-molded joins. Takumi bamboo is lightweight and warm. Set includes US 3 through US 15.

sets.name: Soft Touch Crochet Hook Set
sets.description: Ergonomic crochet hooks with cushioned rubber handles. Aluminum hook with soft-grip handle reduces hand fatigue. Sizes B/1 through J/10.

sets.name: Silvalume Crochet Hook Set
sets.description: Classic aluminum crochet hooks with a smooth anodized finish. Industry-standard inline hook design preferred by many crocheters. Sizes E/4 through K/10.5.

sets.name: Bamboo Crochet Hook Set
sets.description: Lightweight bamboo crochet hooks with inline head design. Warm and comfortable with gentle yarn grip. Sizes E/4 through J/10.

sets.name: Etimo Crochet Hook Set - Red
sets.description: Premium Japanese crochet hooks with cushion grip handles. Precision-crafted aluminum hooks with ergonomic elastomer handles. Known for exceptionally smooth hook throats. Sizes 2/0 through 7/0 (2.0mm-4.5mm).

sets.name: Etimo Crochet Hook Set - Rose
sets.description: Premium Japanese crochet hooks with rose-pink cushion grip handles. Same precision as the Red set with a feminine aesthetic. US letter sizes B/1 through J/10.

sets.name: Ergonomics Crochet Hook Set
sets.description: Ergonomically shaped crochet hooks with soft-grip handles. Designed in collaboration with physiotherapists. Each size is a different color. Sizes 2.0mm through 6.0mm.

sets.name: Ergonomics Interchangeable Knitting Needle Set
sets.description: Lightweight synthetic tips with ergonomic shape. Color-coded by size. Smooth joins with flexible cables. Sizes 4.0mm through 8.0mm.
